behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, required literal strings (ImmutableCapture, visitedEffects, hookKind == null, isRefLValue, interpolatedAsJsx, Freeze, Create, Frozen, mutate(ref.current), PanResponder.create, yarn workspace babel-plugin-react-compiler lint, yarn prettier-all) are explicitly listed in the instruction.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what patterns must be present but doesn't give specific line-by-line replacements; the agent still has to architect the switch-case logic.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific internal identifiers like 'visitedEffects' (line 'Missing visitedEffects dedup tracking'), exact case string "case 'ImmutableCapture':", and specific variable names 'hookKind == null' and 'instr.effects'—alternative correct implementations using different naming would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are file content string checks (src.includes('case ImmutableCapture'), fixture.includes('mutate(ref.current)')) rather than executing the compiler; only test_panresponder_runtime_works and the lint/jest tests actually execute code, and the jest test runs unrelated tests (DisjointSet|Result|envConfig).

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub wouldn't pass: tests require specific file content patterns and the PanResponder runtime test requires returning the input argument.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each verification criterion in instruction.md (ImmutableCapture, visitedEffects, fixture updates, PanResponder export, type provider, CLAUDE.md) has a corresponding test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly named with descriptive function names and docstrings (test_panresponder_runtime_works, test_validation_handles_immutable_capture, etc.).

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output is produced.

no_typos.reason: File paths and commands appear correct and consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists near-exact implementation details: 'visitedEffects set', 'ImmutableCapture case', 'hookKind == null and instr.effects', 'Mutate, MutateTransitive, MutateConditionally' — this essentially specifies the internal implementation structure rather than describing the bug.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: CLAUDE.md diff is a small localized addition of two sections.
